# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

imports:
- path: google/cloud/compute_v1
resources:
- name: instance-group-manager
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    baseInstanceName: my-instance
    versionTarget: projects/{PROJECT}/zones/{ZONE}/instanceGroupManagers/my-instance
    targetSize: 2
    instanceTemplate: projects/{PROJECT}/global/instanceTemplates/my-template
    targetPools:
    - projects/{PROJECT}/regions/{REGION}/targetPools/my-pool
    zone: {ZONE}
